0.q: RpoE4 controls its own transcription and that it is negatively regulated by rseF (regulator of sigma rpoE4; CH03274), which is cotranscribed with rpoE4.

1.q: Other genes controlled by RpoE4 include rpoH2... which encode proteins involved in the stress response (a heat shock sigma factor...).
